meta.title: Navaro – simple tools for business processes
meta.description: Navaro helps companies simplify business processes with simple tools that save time.

hero.subtext: Navaro helps companies simplify business processes with simple tools that save time.

solutions.title: Solutions your business actually needs.
solutions.subtitle: Navaro adapts to your business. You only pay for what you use.

items.name: OfferGen
items.description: Create professional quotes, PDF export, send to customer and track status.

items.name: InvoiceGen
items.description: Invoicing with automatic numbering, VAT calculation and PDF export.

items.name: More modules
items.description: We're preparing more simple tools for business processes and everyday admin.

about.label: About us
about.title: Software should solve real problems.
about.body1: We believe software should solve real problems, not add more complexity.
about.body2: That's why every Navaro module is built from real business needs — to save time, simplify daily work, and help people focus on what matters.

why.label: Why Navaro
why.title: A practical approach without unnecessary complexity.

items.title: We start with the problem
items.text: First we find where your business loses time, then we suggest a solution.

items.title: We keep it simple
items.text: Modules are designed to be understood and used quickly without unnecessary complexity.

items.title: We save time
items.text: Repetitive steps, documents and sending are handled faster and with fewer errors.

items.title: You choose only what you need
items.text: Navaro is modular. Use only the tools that make sense for your business.

earlyAccess.label: OfferGen Early Access
earlyAccess.title: Become a Founding Partner of Navaro
earlyAccess.description: Help us build the best tool for creating quotes.

offergenEarlyAccess.h1: Become a Founding Partner of Navaro
offergenEarlyAccess.subtext: Help us build the best tool for creating quotes.
offergenEarlyAccess.body1: We're building OfferGen, a simple tool that helps businesses create professional quotes in minutes.
offergenEarlyAccess.body2: We're now looking for the first companies who want to be part of its creation.
offergenEarlyAccess.body3: Your feedback will directly shape the future development of the product.
offergenEarlyAccess.benefitsTitle: Early access and real influence on the product.
benefits: Free access during the beta period
Access to the product before public release

betaForm.title: Request beta access
betaForm.description: Fill in the form and we'll send you a beta invite.
betaForm.name: Full name
betaForm.message: How do you currently create quotes? (optional)
betaForm.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch soon with your invite.
betaForm.error: Something went wrong. Please contact us at info@navaro.pro.
